briefdescription.para: Enables interrupts for the core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the specified interrupts and the global interrupt enable for the warp filter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the interrupt enable mask.

simplesect.para: None.
Both the specific interrupt and global interrupt enable are set.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the specified interrupts and the global interrupt enable for the warp filter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the interrupt disable mask.

simplesect.para: None.
Both the specific interrupt and global interrupt enable are cleared.

briefdescription.para: Installs an asynchronous callback function for frame done events.

detaileddescription.para: This function registers a callback function that will be invoked when a frame processing is complete. Invoking this function for a handler that has already been installed replaces it with the new handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: None.
Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: Interrupt handler for the Warp Filter core.

detaileddescription.para: This handler clears the pending interrupt and determines if the source is the frame done signal. If yes, it calls the registered callback function. The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance that just interrupted.

simplesect.para: None.
The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_warp_filter *InstancePtr, u32 DescNum, XVWarpFilter_InputConfigs *configPtr, u32 valid_seg, u32 lblock_count, u32 line_num)
memberdef.name: XVWarpFilter_ProgramDescriptor

briefdescription.para: Programs a descriptor with given configurations.

detaileddescription.para: This function locates the specified descriptor and configures it with the provided input parameters including dimensions, addresses, and processing parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the descriptor number to be configured.
is the input configuration pointer containing the configuration parameters.
is the number of valid segments in the remap vector.
is the number of output blocks decoded by the first warp filter core.
is the line number from which the second warp filter core starts reading the source image.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if programming descriptor is successful. XST_FAILURE if descriptor is not valid.
Descriptor number must be less than the total number of descriptors.

detaileddescription.para: This function traverses the descriptor chain and frees all allocated memory for each descriptor, then resets the base address and count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.

simplesect.para: None.
This function must be called before the instance is destroyed to prevent memory leaks.

briefdescription.para: Creates the descriptors for the warp filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function allocates and initializes a chain of descriptors for the warp filter operation. Each descriptor is aligned to the address width requirement and linked together in a chain.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the number of descriptors to be created.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if descriptors created successfully. XST_FAILURE if descriptor creation failed.
Descriptors are allocated with aligned memory and linked in a chain.

briefdescription.para: Sets the source frame buffer address in a descriptor.

detaileddescription.para: This function locates the specified descriptor and updates its source frame buffer address with the provided value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the descriptor number to be configured.
is the address of the source frame buffer.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if programming descriptor is successful. XST_FAILURE if descriptor is not valid.
Descriptor number must be less than the total number of descriptors.

briefdescription.para: Sets the destination frame buffer address in a descriptor.

detaileddescription.para: This function locates the specified descriptor and updates its destination frame buffer address with the provided value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.
is the descriptor number to be configured.
is the address of the destination frame buffer.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if programming descriptor is successful. XST_FAILURE if descriptor is not valid.
Descriptor number must be less than the total number of descriptors.

detaileddescription.para: This function initiates the warp filter core processing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

detaileddescription.para: This function stops the warp filter core by clearing the autostart bit, setting the flush bit, and waiting for the flush operation to complete.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_filter instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the core entered stop state successfully. XST_FAILURE if the core failed to stop (flush timeout).
The function waits for a flush done signal with timeout.
